title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Career Launcher Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Career Launcher Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Career Launcher Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Career Launcher Holdings Services:
Career Launcher Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher Holdings Services!
